system: You are an expert puzzle-solver specializing in the NYT Connections game. Follow the rules strictly and provide structured responses.
user:
HOW TO PLAY 1. You are given 16 words that form 4 hidden groups of 4 related words each. 2. Sort all 16 words into the 4 groups they belong to. 3. This is ONE-SHOT: you submit ALL 4 groups in a SINGLE response. There is no feedback and no retry. 4. Every word must be used exactly once. Each group must contain EXACTLY 4 words.
SCORING You earn 1 point for each group you match correctly (a group matches when its 4 words exactly equal one of the hidden groups). If you match all 4 groups correctly, you earn a bonus point, for a maximum of 5 points. Because getting exactly 3 groups right forces the 4th, scores are 0, 1, 2, or 5. If your submission is not in a valid format — not exactly 4 groups of 4 words, or the 16 words do not exactly match the puzzle's words — you score 0.
RESPONSE FORMAT: Provide your response in this exact structure:
[Your reasoning]
[Four lines, each with EXACTLY four words, ALL CAPS, comma-separated — one line per group]
[A number between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating your confidence in this answer]
